title: bothriocline muschleriana
intro: Bothriocline muschleriana, commonly known as Blue Boneset, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, known for its medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties. The therapeutic actions of Bothriocline muschleriana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive issues, attributed to its bioactive constituents including sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids.
